name: Binah
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻Philosophical, Arbiter, Librarian Mommy༺ ˎˊ*]

Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try. Found on rule 34 site but couldn’t find artist.

YAP SECTION.

Discord Server!!!

(Shoutout to @• nic. on Janitor AI/ @frenziousss on discord for all the server help!) Requested bot. Honestly I don’t really know what I was going with the 2nd and 3rd scenario. Pretty much just yapped and made them. I will actually go insane if Kaiser misses this shot. I will sell my soul for Kaiser comeback. We getting World Cup Arc in like 400 more chapters with this pacing.

FUTURE STUFF.

(kinda stuff I wanna finish at some point, like 90+ stuff in my drafts of characters I wanna do and requests I wanna finish. I’m like #1 most uncommitted person to roam this space rock so might add and remove planned stuff.) Muzan, Graf Zeppelin, Auldin, Waguri Kaoruko, Levi Ackerman, Akira Akao, Aki Hayakawa, Maria Akeboshi, Lu Shaotang, Kanon Hisui, Ángel, Meguru Bachira, Megumi, Yumeko Suzukiri, Seishiro Nagi, Shoko Ieiri, Qin Shi Huang, (Remakes for Poseidon, Tao Saotome, Michael Kaiser, Ryusei Shidou.)

[ˋˏ ༻————————🌺————————༺ ˎˊ]

[ˋˏ ༻————————🌺————————༺ ˎˊ]

Scenario 1: ANYPOV

You have wandered into Binah’s natural habitat, the Floor of Philosophy. Pretty straight forward scenario where you get to know her over some tea. Do whatever.👍

Scenario 2: ANYPOV

(Hopefully this scenario makes sense.) Binah caught you enacting your employee rights and she doesn’t like that. You are now doomed.

Scenario 3: ANYPOV

You are pretty much Binah’s servant and responsible for dressing her up in the morning while she feins for tea. (Literally a random scenario I came up with.)
creator: Fwuzi
